alex_encounter.title: Encounter and defeat a Ch11-relevant Alex's Mobs boss — Cachalot Whale, Void Worm, or Crimson Mosquito

alex_loot.title: Collect rare Alex's Mobs loot from a boss fight — unique drops for crafting or decoration

subtitle.text: 89 mobs. The ones that matter in Ch11 live in warped forests, deep oceans, and the void edge.

description: CH.11 · ALEX'S BOSSES
▸ Alex's Mobs adds 89 creatures.
Most are ambient. Several are boss-tier.
The ones that matter for Ch11 loot
are in the biomes you are already traveling through:
warped forest, deep ocean, and void-adjacent zones.
◈ CH11-ACCESSIBLE ALEX'S MOBS BOSSES
└ ✦ Cachalot Whale: ocean boss-tier mob
Found in deep ocean biomes (Y -30 or lower)
Drops: whale-specific loot, high HP + ram attack
Worth farming: unique decorative and material drops
└ ✦ Void Worm: void-adjacent biome boss
Spawns in terrain with void exposure (mountains, cliffs)
Tunnels through terrain — burst out of ground attack
Drops: worm-specific materials used in ISS constructs
└ ✦ Crimson Mosquito: large parasite mob
Crimson Forest biome in Nether
Drains HP over time — treat as DoT boss
Drops: mosquito-specific material (immune to Crimson)
◈ WARPED MOSCO NOTES
└ Already covered in ch11_r_warped1/2 quests
└ The Mosco provides Hemolymph Sac for Corrupted Eye
└ After the Hemolymph farm, the Warped Forest still
has ambient Alex's Mobs worth fighting
◈ ALEX'S MOBS NOTABLE DROPS (CH11 ZONE)
└ Most drops are decorative or armor supplements
└ Some materials feed into ISS constructs and T.O. Magic
└ Check JEI under alexsmobs: for any new recipes
unlocked by Ch11 scroll research
└ ▲ NOTE: plague_doctor and spreader are NOT in
Alex's Mobs (confirmed absent from mod source)
Do not look for them in the mod files
▸ The Worm came from underground.
The Whale came from the deep.
The Mosco came from the rot.
All three are the world looking back at you
from the dimensions you've already been through.
▶ Defeat a Ch11-zone Alex's Mobs boss [check]
▶ Collect rare Alex's Mobs boss loot [check]
◇ Alex's Mobs (alexsmobs:) ≠ Alex's Caves (alexscaves:).
Different mods. Different namespaces.
The Nucleeper (alexscaves:) is not in Alex's Mobs.
The Void Worm (alexsmobs:) is not in Alex's Caves.
Check the namespace before mining or farming.
